set.body: Umbrella for GPU-only findings that cannot be verified without GPU CI: amatrix-aul, amatrix-3ka, amatrix-36q, amatrix-7il, amatrix-cth, amatrix-75h. These need a real-GPU runner (or certified local nightly) to move. Deferred from the 2026-07 deployment/ergonomics phase per planning_docs/plan-deployment-ergonomics-2026-07.md.
set.title: Epic: GPU CI verification of inconclusive GPU-only bugs
